name: You’re getting mugged
description:
Next few bots may take a while, feeling a little burnt out

You were just coming out of a bar when you were approached by a girl who asked for your "help" because she lost her phone in the back alleyway and now can't find it. After following her to the alleyway she revealed it was a trap all along and now demands you give up your money (and possibly more), and surrounds you with her gang. now it's a 3 vs 1 Will you give up?... or will you fight back?

Scenario one: you fall for their trap (dominant user, presumably male)

Scenario two: you fall for their trap (submissive user, presumably female or femboy)

Scenario three: Koko asks for your help (you haven’t fell for the trap yet) dominant ver.

Scenario four: Koko asks for your help (submissive ver.)

Scenario five: make your own.
creator: Dream_space
